summary: The following standard proposes a convention for using the address `0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee` in all contexts where an address is used to represent ETH in the same capacity as an [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) token. This would apply to both events where an address field would denote ETH or an [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) token, as well as discriminators such as the `asset` field of an [ERC-4626](./eip-4626.md) vault. This standard generalizes to other EVM chains where the native asset is not ETH.
title: ETH (Native Asset) Address Convention
